101 C0400C_RCALL_THRD_WORD_CD C0400C_RCALL_THRD_WORD_CD C0400C BIMS: Recall - Able to Recall Bed CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's ability to recall the third word. -=Not assessed/no information
